descriptions..claude/agents/templates/workflows/Sync_: Feat: dedicated, lightweight sync devkit workflow scoped to the project-orchestrator root's 3 owned files (CLAUDE.md merge, Project_Priming.md skip, Build_Software_Project_Workflow.md overwrite) — the full per-repo Sync_Devkit_Workflow.md is too heavy to reuse.
descriptions..claude/agents/templates/Project_CLAUDE_: Feat: project-orchestrator CLAUDE.md now carries Devkit source/version fields and a sync devkit trigger/section, so an already-scaffolded orchestrator folder can pull in future devkit template updates instead of only being set at build software time.
Feat: project-orchestrator CLAUDE.md now has an Orchestrator Startup section requiring Project_Priming.md to be read at the start of every session, mirroring the devkit's own CLAUDE.md pattern.

descriptions..claude/agents/templates/context/Project: Feat: project-orchestrator root now gets its own lightweight Project_Priming.md (product overview, repo structure, orchestrator's role) instead of no priming context at all — written by Build_Software_Workflow.md Stage 4 Path B, orchestrator-direct.

descriptions..claude/agents/templates/rules/Product_O: Fix: §9 Release Gate no longer scopes VERSION/CHANGELOG.md to Java-skeleton repos — both are now a universal devkit convention for every scaffolded repo; only the automated release.yml cut remains Java-specific.

descriptions..claude/agents/templates/shared/workflow: Feat: sprint-end 'Release Decision' step — checks for a Java-skeleton VERSION file, and if the current CHANGELOG section has real entries, asks the user before stripping -SNAPSHOT and triggering release.yml; skips silently if there's nothing release-worthy or VERSION doesn't exist. Never releases automatically.
descriptions..claude/agents/templates/rules/Product_O: Feat: §9 Release Gate cross-references the new mechanical Sprint_Workflow.md Release Decision step for Java-skeleton repos.

descriptions..claude/agents/templates/shared/workflow: Fix (RF-012 ST-000014): Stage 1 step 3 non-feature GitHub mode — replace single 3-label AND query (always returns 0 results) with three separate per-label queries whose results are unioned to identify in-flight stories.

Fix (RF-014 ST-000014): sprint-end Devkit Contribution fallback — replace 'open a pull request' instruction with 'open an Issue labeled retro:contribution' so the apply retros workflow can find the contribution.
descriptions..claude/agents/templates/shared/CLAUDE_S: Fix (RF-011 ST-000014): Agent File Integrity section — replace undefined trigger 'update agents' and 'Update_Agents_Workflow.md' with correct trigger 'sync devkit' and 'Sync_Devkit_Workflow.md'.
descriptions..claude/agents/templates/context/Project: Fix (RF-007/RF-008 ST-000014): §6 document paths aligned with Document_Index flat top-level paths (docs/requirements/, docs/plan/, docs/sprints/, docs/technical/, docs/wiki/); Sprint_1_Overview.md parameterized to Sprint_N_Overview.md.
descriptions..claude/agents/templates/instructions/pr: Fix (RF-009 ST-000014): Story Closure Task retro reference changed from Retro_Rules.md to Agent_Common.md §4, matching all other role instruction files.
descriptions..claude/agents/templates/instructions/bu: Fix (RF-010 ST-000014): retro section header relabeled from '## Implementer — Business Analyst' to '## Analyst — Business Analyst' to reflect the BA's analyst (not implementer) role.

descriptions..claude/agents/templates/rules/Developer: Fix (RF-005/RF-003 ST-000013): §4 Story files line mode-gated — GitHub mode retains GitHub Issues assertion; Strict mode points to Strict_Mode_Story_Guide.md. §6 Commit Message Rules split into GitHub mode (Conventional Commits) and Strict mode (primary-id format per Strict_Mode_Story_Guide.md) carve-outs; removes vague project-style reference.
descriptions..claude/agents/templates/context/Project: Fix (RF-006 ST-000013): §3 story-workflow opener mode-gated — GitHub mode retains GitHub Issues framing; Strict mode points to local MD files and Strict_Mode_Story_Guide.md. Collaboration rules updated: GitHub mode keeps Issues-comments assertion; Strict mode directs to ## Comments section of story MD.
descriptions..claude/agents/templates/rules/Strict_Mo: Fix (RF-003 ST-000013): §Commit Message Format — replace vague 'project's own style' with explicit spec: lowercase imperative phrase ≤ 60 characters, match project history or default to lowercase imperative. Operation substitution table updated to reference the Commit Message Format section instead of repeating the style note.

descriptions..claude/agents/templates/rules/Story_Sta: Feat (ST-000012 retro): §12 reviewer checklist adds the flag-vs-block rule — a contradiction introduced by the PR blocks approval; a pre-existing problem in an out-of-scope file is approved and recorded as a follow-up story instead

Fix (RF-001/002/004): §1 Testing row owner corrected to TL (was QA); §4 Implementer Workflow — remove conflicting Review→Testing step (TL owns status:testing); §2 add note distinguishing GitHub Issue Assignee (user account) from body Assigned field (agent role); §12 Merge Gate — add QA sign-off requirement alongside TL approval; §13 clarify GitHub Assignee is optional/may be unset

Fix (RF-004): §1 Testing row owner corrected to TL (was QA); §2 add note distinguishing GitHub Issue Assignee (user account) from body Assigned field (agent role); §13 clarify GitHub Assignee is optional/may be unset
descriptions..claude/agents/templates/shared/workflow: Fix (RF-013): Stage 4 non-behavioral and behavioral paths — remove promote-next-story steps; next-story routing delegated to Stage 0 (Story Discovery)

descriptions..claude/agents/templates/rules/Story_Sta: Feat (ST-000016 retro): §3 adds guidance to distinguish per-file vs global/aggregate checks when writing fixture-coverage AC (global checks can't be isolated to one per-file fixture); §9 requires reconciling body AC in the same pass when a design-first approval comment narrows or supersedes an AC
descriptions..claude/agents/templates/rules/CICD_Vali: Feat (ST-000016 retro): add notes that PR-triggered CI gates must also include a push:[ci-validation] trigger so the pre-merge validation flow produces a referenceable run, and that gitignored reference paths won't exist on the runner — surface them locally before pushing

descriptions..claude/agents/templates/shared/workflow: Feat: Devkit Contribution step now adds the retro:contribution label on gh issue create so retro issues are scannable as a group (supports the apply retros workflow)

descriptions..claude/agents/templates/instructions/pr: Fix (#22): repoint Plan Next Sprint references from CLAUDE.md (which has no such content) to .claude/agents/workflows/Plan_Sprint_Workflow.md — pipeline rules, sprint capacity limit, and PO_questions.md format
descriptions..claude/agents/templates/rules/Product_O: Fix (#22): §4 deferred-phase label example phase:2 -> phase-2 to match the canonical phase-N scheme used by filters elsewhere
descriptions..claude/agents/templates/rules/Technical: Fix (#20): PR-approval contradiction resolved (§2/§5 now mandate gh pr comment, never gh pr review --approve); added Memory to §1 pre-start read sequence; renumbered sections sequentially (8-12, was 10/11/13/12/14)

descriptions..claude/agents/templates/rules/Product_O: Fix: add Version-bump AC rule — write 'version.txt bumped' without predicting the target number; predicting causes AC/implementation mismatch when a prior story shifts the version
descriptions..claude/agents/templates/shared/workflow: Fix: Stage 4 closure — remove all status:* labels before adding status:done; prevents ghost labels when story passes through multiple statuses (e.g. status:review left after status:done set)
Feat: add Devkit Contribution step at sprint end — privacy scan of sprint summary Findings sections, user opt-in to share via gh issue create or local export file fallback

descriptions._note: ST-000010: created community-retros/README.md — no template files deployed to target projects changed; version bump only

descriptions..claude/agents/templates/rules/Retro_Rul: Fix: add Privacy Rule section — signal items must not reference project names, repo names, domain-specific paths, business logic terms, or client identifiers; includes bad/good phrasing examples
descriptions..claude/agents/templates/shared/workflow: Fix: Stage 1 — add step-positioning check; implementers must flag AC boundary-only positioning in multi-step sequences as an open question to PO

descriptions..claude/agents/templates/wiki/Testing_Gu: New: wiki template for Testing_Guidelines.md — sections with {{PLACEHOLDER}} markers filled by init project from tech stack scan
descriptions..claude/agents/templates/wiki/Developmen: New: wiki template for Development_Standards.md — git branching, commit format, testing standards, linting, file structure
descriptions..claude/agents/templates/wiki/Code_Revie: New: wiki template for Code_Review_Checklist.md — developer pre-PR checklist and TL review criteria
descriptions..claude/agents/templates/wiki/Language_S: New: wiki template for {Language}_Style_Guide.md — naming, error handling, concurrency, design patterns per detected language
descriptions..claude/agents/templates/workflows/Sync_: Feat: add wiki files merge strategy — new template sections appended with [UPDATE REQUIRED]; existing project content never overwritten

descriptions..claude/agents/templates/shared/workflow: Fix: Stage 2 step 6 — add explicit status:testing label step and do-not-merge warning before proceeding to Stage 3
descriptions..claude/agents/templates/rules/Technical: Fix: §2 PR Approval — remove 'ready to merge' phrase; add explicit no-merge instruction. Fix: §3 — status:testing set before merge, not after
descriptions..claude/agents/templates/rules/Story_Sta: Fix: §1 Testing row — status:testing set after TL approval and before merge (QA tests dev branch)
descriptions..claude/agents/templates/rules/QA_Rules_: Fix: §8 — add no-skip rule requiring escalation to user if sandbox/automation cannot be run; self-approval of skip is not permitted

descriptions..claude/agents/templates/shared/workflow: Feat: annotate all agent spawn calls with model assignments (Stage 1 implementers → sonnet; Stage 2 TL reviewer → opus; Stage 2 Dev peer reviewer → sonnet; Stage 3 QA → sonnet; Stage 4 PO behavioral → haiku; mid-impl consultation agents → sonnet)
Feat: annotate all agent spawn calls with model assignments (PO → sonnet; question-answering agents → sonnet)
Feat: annotate all agent spawn calls with model assignments (Stage 1 Dev/QA/BA → sonnet; Stage 1/2 TL → opus; Stage 2 PO → sonnet)

descriptions..claude/agents/templates/rules/QA_Rules_: Fix: §4 coverage audit rule — updating broken tests is a regression fix, not new coverage; new behavior requires dedicated test cases regardless of architecture. Fix: §4 integration test skip — QA must report unlisted skip constraints to user first, then escalate to TL if directed
descriptions..claude/agents/templates/rules/Developer: Fix: §5 spec-first rule — when story has an API Spec Reference section, update the spec before writing any implementation code
descriptions..claude/agents/templates/shared/workflow: Fix: Stage 3 merge gate — add explicit warning that the Merge Procedure fires only at behavioral path step 9, not at Stage 3 entry

descriptions..claude/agents/templates/shared/CLAUDE_S: New: shared CLAUDE.md template content (mode-neutral); replaces CLAUDE_TEMPLATE.md
descriptions..claude/agents/templates/github/CLAUDE_t: New: github-mode CLAUDE.md variant (references shared file)
descriptions..claude/agents/templates/strict/CLAUDE_t: New: strict-mode CLAUDE.md variant (references shared file)
descriptions..claude/agents/templates/shared/workflow: New: shared Sprint Workflow content
New: shared Shared Pipeline Stages content
descriptions..claude/agents/templates/github/workflow: New: github-mode Shared Pipeline Stages variant
descriptions..claude/agents/templates/strict/workflow: New: strict-mode Shared Pipeline Stages variant
descriptions..claude/agents/templates/shared/workflow: New: shared Start Story Workflow content
descriptions..claude/agents/templates/github/workflow: New: github-mode Start Story Workflow variant
descriptions..claude/agents/templates/strict/workflow: New: strict-mode Start Story Workflow variant (adds strict pre-flight)
descriptions..claude/agents/templates/shared/workflow: New: shared Resume Story Workflow content
descriptions..claude/agents/templates/github/workflow: New: github-mode Resume Story Workflow variant
descriptions..claude/agents/templates/strict/workflow: New: strict-mode Resume Story Workflow variant
descriptions..claude/agents/templates/shared/workflow: New: shared Create Stories Workflow content
descriptions..claude/agents/templates/github/workflow: New: github-mode Create Stories Workflow variant
descriptions..claude/agents/templates/strict/workflow: New: strict-mode Create Stories Workflow variant
descriptions..claude/agents/templates/shared/workflow: New: shared Plan Sprint Workflow content
descriptions..claude/agents/templates/github/workflow: New: github-mode Plan Sprint Workflow variant
descriptions..claude/agents/templates/strict/workflow: New: strict-mode Plan Sprint Workflow variant
descriptions..claude/agents/templates/shared/workflow: New: shared Refine Sprint Workflow content
descriptions..claude/agents/templates/github/workflow: New: github-mode Refine Sprint Workflow variant
descriptions..claude/agents/templates/strict/workflow: New: strict-mode Refine Sprint Workflow variant
descriptions..claude/agents/templates/workflows/Sync_: Update: workflow files section now uses mode-specific paths templates/{mode}/workflows/ for split candidates

descriptions..claude/agents/templates/CLAUDE_TEMPLATE: Fix: removed analyze <requirement> row from Workflows table (Analyst_Workflow is devkit-only, not deployed to target projects)
descriptions..claude/agents/templates/instructions/pr: Fix: Story Closure Task steps 3-5 now mode-conditional (github: issue close via gh; strict: edit local story MD + append closure comment)

descriptions..claude/agents/templates/CLAUDE_TEMPLATE: Refactor: removed inline workflow content; replaced with clean routing table pointing to workflow files
descriptions..claude/agents/templates/workflows/Sprin: Fix: Observations write rule now requires agent role prefix on agent-reported items
descriptions..claude/agents/templates/workflows/Creat: Fix: added next-sprint resolution logic for both GitHub mode (gh issue list jq numeric sort + gh label list warning) and strict mode (glob + numeric parse)
descriptions..claude/agents/templates/workflows/Plan_: Fix: Stage 4 step 4 — explicit feature/non-feature story label sub-bullets instead of implicit conditional
descriptions..claude/agents/templates/workflows/Refin: Fix: replaced gh label list | grep (alphabetical sort bug) with gh issue list jq numeric sort for non-feature sprint identification; added gh label list warning
descriptions..claude/agents/templates/workflows/Share: Fix: deletion pre-check — added trigger examples and proceed-immediately rationale; Stage 2 and Stage 3 fast-path fallback — added domain knowledge examples

descriptions..claude/agents/templates/instructions/pr: Fix: added explicit status rule forbidding status:ready promotion during plan sprint; tightened Step 5 label guidance for existing stories

descriptions..claude/agents/templates/workflows/Sync_: Added auto-approve flag, changes.json description/checksum format, WebFetch curl fallback, Document_Index skip strategy, missing expected files check
descriptions..claude/agents/templates/scripts/check_d: New: SessionStart hook script for devkit version notification (Windows)
New: SessionStart hook script for devkit version notification (Mac/Linux)
